keys.restored: Kopi ya senotlolo e buseditšwe ✓ Dinotlolo di tsenišwe mo lefelong la gago

keySetup.title: Bea dinotlolo tša gago tša sešomiši
keySetup.description: Sešomiši se ga se na senotlolo sa gago sa poraebete. Laisa kopi ye e šireletšego ka phasewete, goba bopa para ya senotlolo e ncha (o tla kgona go bala melaetša e mpsha go tloga bjale).
keySetup.chooseFile: Kgetha faele gomme o tsenye phasewete.
keySetup.imported: Senotlolo sa poraebete se tsenišwe mo sešomišing. O ka bala melaetša ya kgale bjale.
keySetup.enterPassword: Tsenya phasewete ya akhaonte ya gago gore re kgone go boloka dinotlolo tša gago ka polokego.

Reset encryption for this account?

encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Use your device passcode or restore a backup to unlock encrypted messages.

smsConsent.label: I consent to receive SMS notifications and alerts from {{companyName}}. Message frequency may vary. Msg & data rates may apply. Reply <stop>STOP</stop> to unsubscribe at any time. Reply <help>HELP</help> for help.

auth.headline: Melaetša ye e šireletšego bakeng sa mang kapa mang, kae kapa kae
auth.description: Go šireletša ka mokgwa wa go fela go fela, phetolelo go maleme a 100+, melaetša e nyamelago, le go letsetša ka lentši/gontši.

feature.encryption: Go šireletša ka mokgwa wa go fela go fela ka tlwaelo
feature.translation: Phetolelo ya melaetša ye e bohlale ye e šomago ka go rona
feature.disappearing: Melaetša e nyamelago & ditšhupetšo tša go bala
feature.privacy: Polokego ya pele. Datha ya gago, taolo ya gago.
feature.translate: Phetolelo ya melaetša ye e bohlale ye e šomago ka go rona

hero.line1: Melaetša ye e šireletšego bakeng sa mang kapa mang, kae kapa kae — ka
hero.sub: Hwetša nomoro ya mohala ye e šireletšego ya mahala gore o letsetše le go romela melaetša lefaseng ka Wi-Fi goba datha. Enjoy go šireletša ka mokgwa wa go fela go fela, melaetša e nyamelago, le go letsetša ka HD ka lentši/gontši — ka dithulusi tše di šomago ka go rona tše di thusago go boloka kgokagano ka nako ya go tshela meeli.
hero.freeNote: Go letsetša le go romela melaetša tša motheo di mahala. Dithulusi tša AI tše di phahameng le ditshepedišo tša premium di hloka go ntšhafatšwa.

feat.encryption: Go šireletša ka mokgwa wa go fela go fela, ka mehla
feat.translate: Tloša dithibelo tša maleme mo dipoledišano tša gago
feat.disappear: Melaetša e nyamelago & ditšhupetšo tša go bala
feat.privacy: Polokego ya pele. Datha ya gago, taolo ya gago.

auth.desktopTip: O le go desktop? Skena ka mohala wa gago gore o hwetše app.
auth.scanHelper: O le go desktop? Skena ka mohala wa gago gore o hwetše app.

headlineAlt.main: Mošomiši wa melaetša ye o šireletšego ye

auth.subhead: Melaetša ya poraebete, ye e šireletšego, le ye e fetolelwa — ka yona nako.
auth.tip: Keletšo: Šomiša akhaonte e tee go web le mohala. Melaetša ya gago e tla dula e synched.
auth.scanHint: Skena gore o laetše app goba o bula mo braoseng ya gago.

registration.passwordDescription: Bonyane ditlhaka tše 6. Šomiša phasewete ye e matla, ye e ikhethang.
registration.smsConsent: Ka go bopa akhaonte, o dumela go amogela ditšhupetšo tša SMS tše di amanago le tiragalo ya gago ya Chatforia (tše di kang melaetša go tšwa go bašomiši ba bangwe). Ditlala tša melaetša & datha di ka šoma. O ka tlogela nako efe kapa efe mo Dipeeleng.
registration.phoneHelp: Used for verification, security, and SMS features where supported.

auth.sendFailed: Go romela go paletšwe. Lekola konsole bakeng sa dintlha.

profile.title: Profaele ya mošomiši
profile.mustLogin: O swanetše go ngena gore o bone dipeelo.
profile.autoTranslate: Phetolelo ya melaetša ka mo go itirilelang
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Bontšha molaetša wa kgale le phetolelo
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Bontšha molaetša wa kgale gotee le phetolelo
profile.filterExplicit: Filtara diteng tše di sa swanegego
profile.allowExplicitContent: Dumela diteng tše di sa swanegego
profile.autoDeleteSeconds: Metsotso go fihla ka go itšhireletša
profile.saveError: Phošo: Ga re kgone go boloka dipeelo
profile.noPrivateKey: Ga go na senotlolo sa poraebete mo sešomišing se gore o laetše.
profile.setBackupPassword: Bea phasewete gore o šireletše kopi ya gago:
profile.backupDownloaded: Kopi ye e šireletšego e laetšwe.
profile.importSuccess: Senotlolo sa poraebete se tsenišwe mo sešomišing.
profile.importFailed: Go tsenya senotlolo go paletšwe (phasewete e fosahetšego goba faele e senyegile).
profile.keysRotated: Para e ncha ya senotlolo e bopilwe gomme senotlolo sa phatlalala se laetšwe.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Senotlolo sa gago sa poraebete ga se tšwe mo sešomišing se. Laetša kopi ye e šireletšego ka phasewete gore o e buseletše mo sešomišing se sengwe.
profile.backupSync: Kopi ya senotlolo sa go šireletša
profile.themeFreeNotice: O le go Free—šomiša dikgetho tša Sun/Moon tše di bonolo ka tlase. Ntšhafatša gore o bule dithemo tše dingwe.
profile.backupTitle: Dikopi tše di šireletšego & Go syncha disešomiši
profile.backupDesc: Boloka senotlolo sa gago sa go šireletša gore o buseletše melaetša ya gago mo sešomišing se sengwe ka polokego.
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Fifala ge app e sa lebale
profile.planLoadFailed: Go laetša polane ya gago go paletšwe.
profile.freePlanCopy: O le go polane ya mahala. Ntšhafatša gore o bule ditshepedišo tše dingwe tše di kang dikopi, dinomoro tše dingwe, le dikgetho tša polokego tše di phahameng.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ga re kgone go bula portal ya tefo. Ka kgopelo leka gape.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Ntšhupetše ge molaetša wa gago o kopilwe
profile.followHint: Dipalo tša bona di tla bonagala mo feed ya gago ya Following ge ba romela ka baamogedi ba Balatedi (goba Phatlalala).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Go na le phošo mo karolong ye.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Fetišetša di-letsetša le melaetša tše di tsenago go nomoro ya gago ya mohala goba imeile ye e netefaditšwego. Di-letsetša/melaetša tše di tšwago di ka bontšha nomoro ya gago ya Chatforia.
profile.destinationPhone: Nomoro ya mohala ya go fihla (E.164)
profile.destinationPhoneForCalls: Nomoro ya go fihla (E.164) bakeng sa di-letsetša
profile.forwardSaved: Dipeelo tša go fetišetša di bolokilwe
profile.errE164: Tsenya nomoro ya mohala e e nepahego ya E.164 (mohl., +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Kgetha bonyane sebaka se le sengwe (mohala goba imeile).
profile.errQuietHours: Diura tša go thola di swanetše go ba magareng ga 0 le 23.
profile.randomChat: Poledišano ya ka nako efe kapa efe
profile.ageBandPlaceholder: Kgetha nako ya mengwaga ya gago
profile.ageBandHint: Re boloka fela nako ya mengwaga (e seng letsatsi la tsoalo la gago ka botlalo). Se se šomišwa gore re boloke dipara tša Poledišano ya ka nako efe kapa efe di leka-lekane.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Šomiša go bapanya ka mengwaga mo Poledišanong ya ka nako efe kapa efe
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Ge e le on, re leka go para le batho ba nako ya mengwaga e e swanetšego.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Bana ba lilemo tše 13–17 ba bapantšwa fela le bana ba lilemo tše 13–17. Batho ba baholo ba ka se bapantšwe le bana.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Bakeng sa polokego, di-akhaonte tše di lego mo nako ya mengwaga ya 13–17 di bapantšwa fela le di-akhaonte tše dingwe tša 13–17 mo Poledišanong ya ka nako efe kapa efe.
profile.foriaRemember: Leka Ria gore a gopole dilo tše o di boletšego
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Ge se se on, Foria a ka šomiša dipoledišano tša gago tša kgale tša Poledišano ya ka nako efe kapa efe (fela le wena) gore a boloke poledišano e tšwela pele. O ka e tima nako efe kapa efe.
profile.voicemailAutoDeleteDays: Itšhireletša melaetša ya lentši ka morago ga (matšatši)
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Tlogela e le blank gore e dule ka go sa fele
profile.voicemailForwardEmail: Fetišetša molaetša wa lentši go imeile
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Imeile ye melaetša ya lentši e tla rometšwa go yona
profile.voicemailGreetingText: Tlhaloso ya go leboga ka sengwalo
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: E šomišwa ge tlhaloso ya gago ya lentši e sa gona.
profile.voicemailGreetingUpload: Laetša tlhaloso ya molaetša wa lentši
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Tlhaloso ya molaetša wa lentši e laetšwe ka katlego
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Go laetša tlhaloso ya molaetša wa lentši go paletšwe
profile.voicemailNote: Melaetša ya lentši go tšwa go dinomoro tša gago tša Chatforia di tla bolokwa mo inbox ya gago ya Molaetša wa lentši. O ka thaolela tlhaloso le go fetišetša mo mererong e e thekgego.
profile.portHint: O batla go boloka nomoro ya gago ya gona bjale? O ka e tsenya mo Chatforia Wireless.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Control translation, smart replies, and ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Send the last few received messages (sanitized) to AI to suggest quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: If on, suggestions returned by AI will have flagged words masked

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options to make Chatforia easier to use without relying on sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase if you prefer larger text.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when a call rings.
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Show real-time captions from the other participant’s audio.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach a transcript to audio messages you receive.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration with notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on incoming call
Brief bright flash when a call rings.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Store only ciphertext on the server. Disables AI/Translate and moderation previews.
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: Strict E2EE enabled. AI/Translate will be disabled.

port.heading: Tsenya nomoro ya gago ya gona bjale

premium.heading: Eya Premium
premium.description: Bula ditshepedišo tša matla & tloša dipapatšo.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: This feature requires a Premium plan.

upgrade.title: Ntšhafatša
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Thoma ka polane ya rona ya mahala ye e thekgego ka dipapatšo. Eya go ad-free ka Plus, goba bule ditshepedišo tša matla ka moka ka Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Kgetha polane ya app, tsenya dipakete tša datha bakeng sa wena, goba arolelana datha le lapa la gago — ka moka mo lefelong le le tee.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Thoma ka polane ya rona ya mahala ye e thekgego ka dipapatšo. Eya go ad-free ka Plus, goba bule ditshepedišo tša matla ka moka ka Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Tsenya datha ya eSIM ya lefase gore Chatforia e tšwele pele le ge o le kgole le Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Bopa datha ye e arolelanwego bakeng sa lapa la gago gomme o laole tšhomišo ya motho e mong le e mong mo lefelong le le tee.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Bula ditshepedišo tša matla & tloša dipapatšo.

features.chat: Poledišano ya nako e tee le sehlopha, gotee le di-letsetša ka lentši le video
features.media: Arolelana disenepe, melaetša ya lentši, le video tše di khutšo
features.ai: Dikarabo tše di bohlale tša AI le phetolelo ya yona nako (tšhomišo e e nepahego)
features.disappearing: Melaetša e nyamelago le ditaolo tša polokego tša motheo
features.ads: Mahala ka mehla ka dipapatšo mo app

features.allFree: Dilo ka moka tše di lego Free, ntle le dipapatšo

features.plusAll: Dilo ka moka tše di lego Plus
features.themes: Bula dithemo ka moka tša mebala tša premium le go dira app ka gago

features.allPremium: Dilo ka moka tše di lego Premium ka kgwedi — go akaretsa dithemo tše dingwe tša mebala
features.annualBilling: E lefšwa ga tee ka ngwaga
features.save25: Boloka mo go 30% ge o bapetša le go lefa ka kgwedi

marketing.plusDesc: Boiphihlelo bjo bo theko e tlaase bjo bo se nang dipapatšo.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mohala (dipakete tša datha tša eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Tsenya datha ya lefase gore Chatforia e tšwele pele le ge o se na Wi-Fi. Ditheko di fetoga ka mo go nepahego go ya ka naga le chelete ya gago.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Kgetha pakete e le nngwe ya datha ya lefase gore Chatforia e tšwele pele ge o le moetong goba o le kgole le Wi-Fi.
mobile.localEqualsFallback: Ya lehae = naga ya gago ya gona bjale

features.heavyUse: Datha ya lebelo le le phahameng bakeng sa tšhomišo e kudu
features.throttle: Lebelo le ka fokotsega ka morago ga tšhomišo e kudu
features.instant: Go thoma eSIM ka yona nako
features.noContract: Pakete e le nngwe, ga go na konteraka

unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.

disclaimer.devices: Dipakete tša datha tša eSIM di hloka sešomiši se se thekgego sa eSIM le se sa thibelwago. Go ba gona go fapana ka mofuta wa mohala, carrier, le naga. Go phihlelela le lebelo di fapana ka tikologo.
disclaimer.fairUse: Go ya ka pholisi ya tšhomišo e e nepahego le meeli ya lehae

compare.title: Bapetša dipakete tša datha tša eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Tšhomišo ya datha ya nnete e ithekgile ka mokgwa wo o šomišago Chatforia (lentši, video, media, le ditirišo tše dingwe mo mohaleng wa gago).

hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.

mobile.choosePackSubtitle: Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.

badge.bestValue: Boleng bjo bo botse ka GB

feature.instant: Go thoma eSIM ka yona nako

feature.2: One-time data packs with clear pricing
feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable

region.localSubtitle: Best for staying connected in one country.
region.europeSubtitle: Great for trips across supported European countries.
region.globalSubtitle: Best for international travel across multiple regions.

small.title: Pakete ya go thoma
small.bestFor: Maeto a magotlana, melaetša e nyenyane, le di-letsetša tše di sa kgafaletšego

medium.title: Pakete ya moeti
medium.bestFor: Maeto a mafelo a beke, di-letsetša tša VoIP tše di tlwaelegilego, le mepapa

large.title: Pakete ya matla
large.bestFor: Poledišano e kudu, di-letsetša, video, le go šomiša hotspot

xl.title: XL pack
xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.

family.title: Lapa la Chatforia (datha ye e arolelanwego)
family.subtitle: Arolelana datha e le nngwe mo lapeng la gago. Tefo e le nngwe, di-akhaonte tše dintši tša Chatforia, go phihlelela lefase ka bophara.

small.title: Lapa Small
small.desc: E akaretsa 20 GB ya datha ya lebelo le le phahameng ye e arolelanwego — e loketše bakeng sa bašomiši ba 2–3 ba bobebe.

medium.title: Lapa Medium
medium.desc: E akaretsa 40 GB ya datha ya lebelo le le phahameng ye e arolelanwego — e loketše bakeng sa ditho tše 3–5 tše di šomago.

large.title: Lapa Large
large.desc: E akaretsa 80 GB ya datha ya lebelo le le phahameng ye e arolelanwego — bakeng sa malapa a matla a ka mehla a le inthaneteng.

feature.shared: Datha ye e arolelanwego bakeng sa lapa la gago
feature.members: Mema ditho tše di tlaleletšego tše 4
feature.membersMore: E loketše bakeng sa ditho tše 3–5 tše di šomago
feature.manage: Laola meeli bakeng sa motho e mong le e mong
feature.topUp: Tlatša dipakete tše dingwe nako efe kapa efe
feature.bestValue: Boleng bjo bo botse ka GB
feature.fairUse: Go ya ka pholisi ya tšhomišo e e nepahego le meeli ya lehae

family.disclaimer: Dipakete tša lapa di bopa goba di tlatša datha ye e arolelanwego. O ka mema le go tloša ditho nako efe kapa efe.
family.footnote: Dipakete tša lapa di arolelana datha e le nngwe mo di-akhaonteng tše di kgokagantšwego tša Chatforia. Go ba gona le meeli di ithekgile ka naga le melao ya lehae.

why.title: Ke ka lebaka lang batho ba fetela Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia e go fa nomoro ya mohala ya nnete, phetolelo e bohlale, le tsela e e bonagalago ya go ya ad-free ge o se o lebeletše.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Dipapatšo tše di bobebe mo Free, ntšhafatšo e bonolo ya Plus ge o se o lebeletše, le dithulusi tša Premium tše TextNow e se nago tšona.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App ya sebjalebjale, mošomo wa lefase ka pele, le phetolelo ye e šomago ka go rona go fapana le go fetišetša letsetša la kgale.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs di-app tša poledišano
messengers.body: Romela dinomoro tša mohala tša nnete — e seng fela bašomiši ba app e nngwe — ka AI le boemo bjo bo šomago ka go rona. E loketše ge o tšwa go di-app tše di kang TextFree goba TextMe.

feature.translation: Phetolelo e šomago ka go rona ka mo go itirilelang
feature.aiTools: Dithulusi tša AI (go ngwala gape, dikarabo, kakaretšo)

history.voice: E lekanyeditšwe / go ya ka akhaonte

why.disclaimer: Go bapetša go theilwe mo tshedimošong ye e bonagala phatlalala gomme e ka fetoga ka nako. Di-app tše dingwe tša go romela melaetša tša mahala tše di kang TextFree goba TextMe di tlwaelegile go swana le TextNow.

free.q: Na polane ya Mahala e hlile e mahala?
free.a: Ee. Polane ya Mahala e akaretsa nomoro ya Chatforia, go letsetša, le go romela melaetša ka dipapatšo. O ka dula mo Free ka nako e telele, goba ntšhafatša gore o tloše dipapatšo le go bule ditshepedišo tše dingwe.

plusPremium.q: Phapano ke efe magareng ga Plus le Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus e tloša dipapatšo le go lelefatsa histori ya melaetša — e loketše bakeng sa tšhomišo ya ka mehla. Premium e tsenya go dira ka gago, dithulusi tša AI bakeng sa go ngwala gape le dikarabo, le thušo ya pele bakeng sa bašomiši ba kudu.

esim.q: Dipakete tša datha tša eSIM di šoma kae?
esim.a: Chatforia Mohala e šomiša go phihlelela ga eSIM ya lefase ka bophara. Go ba gona go ithekgile ka naga le sešomiši sa gago. O tla bona dikgetho tše di thekgego ge o thoma mo app.

cancel.q: Na nka khansela goba fetola merero nako efe kapa efe?
cancel.a: Ee. O ka laola goba khansela polane ya gago mo letlakaleng la tefo mo app. Diphetogo di šoma qetellong ya nako ya tefo ya gago ya gona bjale.

family.q: Dipakete tša Lapa di šoma bjang?
family.a: Dipakete tša Lapa di bopa datha e le nngwe ye e arolelanwego mo di-akhaonteng tše dintši tša Chatforia. Motho a le mongwe o lefa tefo, gomme o ka mema goba tloša ditho le go bea meeli mo mothong e mong le e mong.

invite.expiryHint: Link ye e fela ka morago ga matšatši a mmalwa. O ka bopa e ncha nako efe kapa efe.

join.title: Kena lapa

join.error: Ga re kgone go o tsenya mo lapeng le. Memo e ka ba e fosahetšego goba e feditšwe.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.subtitle: Meet someone new instantly, or choose to chat with Ria.
randomChat.description: Chat anonymously first. Add Friend later if it feels right.
randomChat.setAge: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.waitingAddFriend: Waiting for them to accept Add Friend…
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Usernames stay hidden until both people choose Add Friend.
randomChat.riaSeparate: Chat with Ria anytime — separate from random human matching.
randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-to-human chats can be saved
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.

ria.intro: Hey there 👋 I’m Ria. What’s on your mind?

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 I’m here. What’s on your mind?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 What would you like to talk about today?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}! I’m all ears — what’s up?
greetings.long4: Nice to see you, {{name}} 👋 What’s on your mind today?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 🙂 Want to vent, ask, or just chat?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}! I’ve got time — what would you like to talk about?
greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, I’m still here. What’s up?
greetings.short2: Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Anything else you wanted to add?
greetings.short3: Back again, {{name}}? 😊 Tell me what’s on your mind.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} ✨ Ready to pick up where we left off?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}! Got something new on your mind?

resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset successfully

support.heading: How can we help?
support.contactIntro: We’ll try to resolve this instantly. If not, our team will follow up.
support.sent: Message sent. We’ll reply by email.
support.sendError: Could not send. Email support@chatforia.com instead.
support.actionFailed: Could not complete that action. Please try again.
support.ticketCreated: We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.escalationMessage: We couldn’t resolve this automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
support.resolvedInstantly: Issue resolved instantly — no ticket needed.

account.q: How do I create or recover my account?
account.a: Download the app or use web, tap “Create account”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”.

privacy.a: Yes. Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted by default. Only you and the recipient can read them.

translate.a: Enable “Auto-translate” in Settings → Appearance & Language. We translate on-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs with minimal metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots and your app version.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: New to Chatforia? This quick start shows the essentials so you can be productive in minutes.

alert.text: This guide will grow as we launch new features. If something’s missing, let us know via

section1.title: 1) Create your account
section1.prefsStart: In the app, open Settings to set your preferences

section2.title: 2) Start messaging
section2.item1: Create a DM or Group and send your first message.
section2.item2: Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages.
section2.item3: Try disappearing messages and read receipts in Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Go further
section3.item1: You can upgrade to a paid plan anytime inside the app.
section3.item2: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.
section3.item2Part1: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.

index.post3: Lebaka leo di-platform tša melaetša di le bohlokwa

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: Ka ga Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia ke sethala sa melaetša sa sebjalebjale se se diretšwego kgokagano e šireletšegilego ya maleme a mantši...
about.valuesTitle: Dilo tše re di tšeago bohlokwa

values.control: Control: Disappearing messages & read receipts are optional.
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages and read receipts are optional.

about.howDescription: Messages are encrypted on your device before they leave it. Translation, backups, and device sync are designed to minimize what our servers can see.
about.privacyDesc: Encryption e matla le di-setting tša sephiri tše di laolwago ke modiriši
about.accessDesc: Phetolelo e akaretšago maleme a mantši
about.controlDesc: Dikarolo tša go swana le melaetša e timelelago le di-read receipts

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: For media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is a privacy-first messaging app that makes cross-language chat effortless. Messages are end-to-end encrypted by default, and built-in translation supports 100+ languages in real time. Users can enable disappearing messages, keep read receipts optional, and sync across devices. Available on iOS, Android, and the web.
press.scanTip: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a private, global messenger launching on web, iOS, and Android. If you care about privacy, encryption, and delightful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How to apply: Use the button below to email your resume and links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Help build the foundation of a new global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, and Android.
• Work directly with the founder on architecture and product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of the stack: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the user base scales.

advertise.title: Advertise with Chatforia
advertise.description: Reach engaged messaging users with tasteful, brand-safe placements. We offer banner inventory in high-visibility spots, sponsorships, and house promos. Premium subscribers do not see ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: We also serve inventory via Google AdSense. You can target Chatforia with publisher ID {{pubId}}, or use the form below for direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: We also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships are available—use the form below.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: We’re finalizing our ad inventory. Tell us about your campaign and we’ll recommend placements.

why.highSession: High session frequency and dwell time in chat UI
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsored moments (e.g., “Start a Chat” modal) available
why.deals: Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity on your account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Pholisi ya Pusetšo ya Tšhelete
refund.intro: Go Chatforia, re leka go fana ka tirelo ya maemo a godimo go badiriši ka moka. Pholisi ye e hlalosa maemo ao pusetšo ya tšhelete e ka newago.

subscriptions.title: Dingwadišo (Subscriptions)
subscriptions.body: Dingwadišo di lefišwa pele gomme di tšwela pele ka nako ye e itšego. O ka di khansela nako efe goba efe ka di-setting tša account ya gago goba platform ye o rekilego ka yona.

eligibility.title: Maleba a Pusetšo
eligibility.body: Pusetšo ya tšhelete e ka fiwa ge go na le ditefelo tše pedi, diphošo tša tefelo, goba mathata a thekniki ao a thibelago phihlelelo ya ditshebeletšo tše di lefelwago. Dikgopelo ka moka di lekolwa ka bonngwe.

nonRefundable.title: Tše di sa Busetšwego
nonRefundable.body: Ka kakaretšo, ga re bušetše tšhelete bakeng sa nako ye e sa dirišwago, dikarolo tša dingwadišo, goba ge o sa khansela pele ga nako ya go mpshafatša.

thirdParty.title: Ditšhebeletšo tša Batho ba Boraro
thirdParty.body: Ge o rekile ka platform ya motho wa boraro bjalo ka Apple App Store, o swanetše go kgopela pusetšo ka kotlološo go bona.

contact.title: Ikgokaganye le Rena
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.

optIn.title: How users opt in
optIn.body: Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated

optOut.title: How users opt out
optOut.stop: Reply STOP to any Chatforia SMS to opt out.

help.title: Help
help.bodyPrefix: Reply HELP for assistance or email

privacyTerms.title: Privacy & Terms
privacyTerms.bodyStart: By consenting to SMS, users also agree to our
